'''Borgo Landing''' was a business located on [[Borgo Prime/Legends|Borgo Prime]]. It owned a number of space docks, which it offered to lease by the [[Standard hour/Legends|hour]] or by the [[Standard month/Legends|month]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Shadow Academy]]'' {{1stm}}
